title: Extract shared setup across case branches into a helper
prompt:
Given:

```
def process(user, action) do
  now = DateTime.utc_now()
  audit_id = gen_audit_id()

  case action do
    :approve ->
      audit_log(user, :approve, now, audit_id)
      MyApp.Workflow.approve(user)
    :reject ->
      audit_log(user, :reject, now, audit_id)
      MyApp.Workflow.reject(user)
    :escalate ->
      audit_log(user, :escalate, now, audit_id)
      MyApp.Workflow.escalate(user)
  end
end
```

Refactor to multi-clause function heads where the shared setup (`now`, `audit_id`, `audit_log`) is handled once in a wrapper function that calls a pattern-matched dispatch. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Workflow.Handler do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Two-step refactor — extract shared setup, then split into heads. Sonnet typically duplicates setup.
